query: Run SHAP on my logistic regression model for credit scoring. I want SHAP values for every applicant.
expected_behavior: Does NOT recommend running shap.KernelExplainer or any other SHAP variant on the logistic regression as a routine workflow

Explains that for linear / logistic models the per-instance attribution is available in closed form (coefficient × (feature_value − background_mean) or equivalent), so SHAP would just approximate the closed form with sampling noise
Hands the user the closed-form approach (read coefficients × deviation from a chosen background mean) instead of producing SHAP values, OR explicitly redirects to that simpler path before proceeding
